goal: Show a complex multi-branch agent workflow with validation gates, parallel analysis branches, and a feedback loop for failed outputs.

context.method_summary: User research question -> Context intake -> parallel literature retrieval, data profiling, and hypothesis planning branches -> Evidence fusion -> Draft figure plan -> Quality gate -> if passed generate final figure asset -> if failed revise plan and loop back to parallel analysis branches -> Final manifest integration

evidence_refs.content: User research question -> Context intake -> parallel literature retrieval, data profiling, and hypothesis planning branches -> Evidence fusion -> Draft figure plan -> Quality gate -> if passed generate final figure asset -> if failed revise plan and loop back to parallel analysis branches -> Final manifest integration
